'''Task Force Whirlwind''' was a task force formed as part of a trap to lure [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] into a trap with another convoy, following a failed previous attempt earlier. The Task Force was on its way to rendezvous with [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Grey Wolf]]'', but Zaarin had sent the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Maelstrom (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Maelstrom'']]'', [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] and [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defenders]] in an attempt to destroy the task force. But the attempt was thwarted by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]]. However, the task force was hopelessly behind schedule and Maarek had to stop Zaarin's attack on the convoy that the task force was supposed to arrive.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
